whenToUse.summary: A single open-ended question - typically 'What is your #1 challenge/question with [topic]?' - deployed to discover what customers actually want. Responses guide product creation and reveal the false beliefs to overcome in sales copy. Exploratory and research-driven, NOT segmentation-driven.
signals: You want to surface the objections to overcome later
doNotUseWhen: You are ready to sell now (use a sales/lead funnel)

blocks: Single open text-area ('What is your #1 question/challenge with ___?')

pageStructure.purpose: Close the loop and softly pre-frame a future offer.
blocks: 'Watch this while you wait' video or relevant resource
Responses piped to a reporting view/spreadsheet

copyFramework.script: Single open-ended question with deliberately minimal copy so answers stay unbiased. No selling on Page 1 (exploratory voice rooted in the Ask method).
copyFramework.notes: Exploratory, not segmentation. The gold is the raw answers - mine them for headlines, hooks, and the false beliefs to break in later funnels.

primaryPersonaResolved.label: The Funnel Architect
primaryPersonaResolved.author: Russell Brunson
owns_scripts: The Attractive Character (backstory, parables, character flaws, polarity)
primaryPersonaResolved.voice: Direct-response funnel mechanics; sequence the visitor from curiosity to conversion.

skill44Widgets: Form widget with a long-answer text area + Name/Email
Submission pipe to a reporting view / spreadsheet (webhook or integration)
ghlBuild.notes: Export responses to a sheet and categorize answers into belief buckets. Keep the page sparse to avoid biasing the answers.
